metadata.title: Production-harden gh-issues import
metadata.description: Make the GitHub issue importer reliable for real-world use: authenticated requests, full pagination, correct dry-run, and accurate exit codes.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: All four hardening fixes shipped, tested (6 unit tests), and verified against a live repo import.

metadata.title: --dry-run silently wrote items instead of previewing
metadata.description: Flag registered as --dry-run but read as ctx.options['dry-run']; runtime normalizes to camelCase 'dryRun', so dry-run was always false and the importer created real items in 'preview' mode. Fixed by reading both key forms via optionEnabled().
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Importer was unauthenticated (60 req/hr, no private repos)
metadata.description: fetchJSON sent no Authorization header. Added resolveGitHubToken() honoring GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN with gh-CLI fallback (60 -> 5000 req/hr, private repos work).
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Failed imports exited 0 (broke automation)
metadata.description: Handler returned { error } which runtime treats as success (exit 0). Switched to throwing for non-zero exit; also fail when every create fails.
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Issue list truncated at one page (no pagination)
metadata.description: per_page=100 with no pagination silently dropped issues beyond page 1. Added RFC-5988 Link-header following via parseNextLink().
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Add publish retry + provenance fallback to release workflow
metadata.description: Replace the npm publish step in .github/workflows/release.yml with a resilient version that (1) skips if the version is already published, (2) retries up to 3 times with 30s sleep, and (3) falls back to publishing without --provenance after persistent registry 404s. Permanent fix for the 2026-05-27 npm E404 outage that left all 19 packages tagged in git but unpublished on npm.
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Release readiness hardening for pm-github
metadata.description: Prepare pm-github as a production-ready pm package with package-local pm tracking, generated changelog data, CI and daily release automation.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.acceptance_criteria: Package installs with pm install; npm release gate passes; changelog is generated from package-local pm data; tracked files and reachable git history have no secret pattern hits.

metadata.title: Add bun-install verification to release workflow
metadata.description: Smoke-test that the just-published npm package installs cleanly via bun via daily release workflow.
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: ci: fix release workflow step ordering
metadata.description: Swap changelog regeneration before release:check so changelog:check sees the version-bumped CHANGELOG.md instead of failing the gate.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Swapped changelog generation before release checks so changelog:check sees updated file. Verified workflow dispatch then triggers npm publish + GH release.

notes.author: codex
notes.text:
2026-05-29 functional readiness audit evidence.

Package checks from /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-github:
- `npm run check`: exit 0, 6s.
- `npm test`: exit 0, 13s; TAP reported `# tests 2`, `# pass 2`, `# fail 0`.
- `npm run pack:dry-run`: exit 0, 9s; tarball `pm-github-2026.5.28.tgz`, package size 6.2 kB, unpacked size 20.1 kB, total files 9.
- `npm run changelog:check`: exit 0, 3s; `Changelog is up to date: /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-github/CHANGELOG.md`.

Hands-on test used temporary workspace `/tmp/pm-core-audit-20260529/workspaces/pm-github.*` with local install `pm install /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-github`.
- Ran no-token public import dry run: `env -u GITHUB_TOKEN -u GH_TOKEN pm --json gh-issues import octocat/Hello-World --dry-run --type Issue`.
- Process exit code was 0, but command result was `{ "error": "GitHub API returned HTTP 403" }` after stderr `Failed to fetch: GitHub API returned HTTP 403`.
- Follow-up GitHub issues endpoint probe returned HTTP 403 with `x-ratelimit-remaining=0`, confirming unauthenticated API rate limit for the caller IP.
- `pm --json list-all | jq -e '.items | length == 0'`: exit 0; dry run/error path did not create local items.

Sensitive-data scan:
- Current tracked files and git history scanned without printing matching values using pattern classes `private_key`, `provider_token`, `secret_assignment`, and `email_address`.
- No matches found for pm-github.

Blockers:
- Hands-on GitHub public import could not complete because GitHub unauthenticated API quota was exhausted (HTTP 403, remaining 0).
- The extension returned an error object while the CLI process exit code stayed 0; release readiness should decide whether fetch failures must produce non-zero exit status.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: 2026-05-29 follow-up: fast-forwarded to current origin/main (v2026.05.29), which already contains the production hardening for authenticated GitHub requests, pagination, dry-run flag handling, and non-zero exit on fetch/create failures. Reapplied dependency floor updates to @unbrained/pm-cli ^2026.5.29, pm-changelog ^2026.5.29-2, peer @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29. Local gate after merge: npm run check PASS, npm test PASS (6 tests), npm run pack:dry-run PASS (pm-github-2026.5.29.tgz, 9 files, 8.2 kB). Regenerated CHANGELOG.md and changelog:check PASS.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: 2026-05-29 release-readiness refresh: package manifest/lock now target @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29 / ^2026.5.29 and pm-changelog ^2026.5.29-2 where applicable. Verified npm run check, npm test, npm run pack:dry-run, npm run audit:prod, npm run changelog:full, npm run changelog:check, npm run release:check, and pm validate. High-confidence worktree/history secret scan recorded no credential-shaped token findings for active package code; nonzero scan rows were classified as placeholders or vendored historical test data where applicable. Logs: /tmp/pm-active-package-gates-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-changelog-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-release-check-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-validate-20260529.tsv, /tmp/pm-active-secret-scan-20260529.tsv.
